_note: Kamino Lending `depositReserveLiquidity`. Discriminator [169,201,30,126,6,205,102,68] is the standard Anchor sighash of the SNAKE_CASE instruction name: sha256('global:deposit_reserve_liquidity')[:8] = [169,201,30,126,6,205,102,68]. Byte-confirmed as the leading 8 bytes of mainnet tx 3tDJBKDLQAYHa8nzmx6oB8c9BwcLHfLD5ELwQ7Xt4BW5Qmwry3QZkjoC9953A3yGNMo4fYPZ1R5NqLBVkydD9hVB (slot 434121752). Because iOS AnchorIDLDocument.sighash snake-cases the name before hashing, this binds robustly even when the served IDL is legacy-format with no explicit discriminators. userSourceLiquidity = account index 7 (kamino_lending on-chain IDL order). liquidityAmount:u64 is the single arg. bindsIdlHash is the sha256 of the on-chain kamino_lending IDL (Anchor IDL PDA 8qLKwp1fk8WyqmzarkuMeZEX3AzL4VDSmA2UZTKT2aCJ); re-pin against the deployed relay /idl hash at go-live. Cross-check leg surfaces as a transferChecked of the reserve liquidity mint (USDC EPjFWdd5AufqSSqeM2qN1xzybapC8G4wEGGkZwyTDt1v), so the relay asset is the mint address. Fail-safe: a mis-authored spec cross-checks as Contradicted, never a silent wrong sign; spec source only, not signed into the served bundle until the gated re-pin.
